{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un kaß ne nomettſeeß un
peeluhgaß/ taß taps tai paſchâ
Stundâ deggoſcha Zepta Wid-
du eemests.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Kad nu wiſſi tee Laudiſ
dsirdeja to Basunes Skannu /
ir tahß Trummetes/ Kohkles/
Wijoles/ Sohma-Stabules un
wiﬀadus ſpehlejamus Rihkus/
tad nonetteheß wiſſiLaudiß/Tan-
tas un Wallodas/ un peeluhdſe
to ſelta Bildi/ ko taß Kehniſſch
NebukadNezars bij uszehlis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tai paſchâ Laikâ peegahje
zitti Kaldeeſnu Wihti/ un apſuh-
dſeja tohß Judus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo tee atbildeja un ſazzija:
Lai taß Kehniſſch muhſcham
dſihwo.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tu Kehniſſch eſſi paweh-
lejs/ ka wiſſeem Zilwekeem/ kad
tee dsirdetu to Basunes Skann-
nu/ ir tahß Trummetes/ Kohk-
les/ Wijoles / Sohma-Stabu-
les/ jaukas Dſeeſmas/ un wiﬀ-
adus ſpehlejamus Rihkus/ bij
nomestees/ un to ſelta Bildi pee-
luhgt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un ka tam/ kaß pee Sem-
mes ne nomestoheß/ un ne pee-
luhgtu/ deggoſchâ Zepli bij me-
ſtam tapt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Teju irr Judu Wihti/ ko
tu par Waldneefeem pahr to Ba-
g Walsti eſſi eezeſlis/ Sa-
mes/ Mesaks un AbedNegus/
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad pawehleja Nebuk-
Nezars ar Duſmahm un Ba-
sibu/ ka bij Sadraſu/ Mefa-
un AbedNegu atwest preekſch-
tad tappe tee Wihti preekſch
Kehnina weſti.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad atbildeja Nebuk-
Nezars/ un ſazzija uß teem:
tas teefi/ Sadraks/ Mefaks
AbedNegus / ka juhß man-
Deewuß ne zeentiaß/ un to ſe-
Bildi ne peeluhdaß/ ko eß et-
uszehliß?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Nu tad/ taiajtees/
juhß dsirdeteet tahß Basu-
Skannu/ ir tahß Trummets
Kohkles/ Wijoles/ Sohma-S-
bules/jaukasDſeeſnas/ un wi-
duß ſpehlejamus Rihkus/ tad
metteetees/ un peeluhdſeet to
Di/ ko eß eſmu darrijs/ bet ja ju-
to ne peeluhdaß/ tad tapſeet ju-
tai paſchâ Stundâ deggo-
Zepli eemesti/ jo kuſch irr
Deewuß / kas juhs no manna
Rohkahm warretu iſpeſtihß?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad atbildeja Sadra-
Mesaks un AbedNegus/ un
ſija uß to Kehniſſu Nebukad-
zaru: Mums ue irr waija-
ka mehß uß tcho Leetu atbild-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Redſi ta/ muhſu Dee-
to mehß gohdain/ gann irr ni-
rens muhs no ta deggoſcha
ka iſglahbt / un muhs arr-
ta-
"
    }
